creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mikael
Date: Mon Nov  9 11:20:16 UTC 2020
New revision: 554706
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/554706

Log:
  dns/dog: create port

  Command-line DNS client, like dig.

  It has colourful output, understands normal command-line argument syntax,
  supports the DNS-over-TLS and DNS-over-HTTPS protocols, and can emit JSON.

  WWW: https://dns.lookup.dog/

  PR:		250948
  Submitted by:	Lewis Cook

Changes:
  head/dns/Makefile
  head/dns/dog/
  head/dns/dog/Makefile
  head/dns/dog/distinfo
  head/dns/dog/pkg-descr
  head/dns/dog/pkg-plist
